svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="投入产出比矩阵" id="matrix"> <mxGraphModel dx="-425" dy="-187" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="826" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="四块基建的投入产出比位置" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="320" x="300" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis_y_top" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="回报高" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="180" y="95" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis_y_bot" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;" value="回报低" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="180" y="485" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis_y_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="见 效 速 度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="60" x="120" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis_x_left" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="投入小" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="215" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="axis_x_right" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=12;" value="投入大" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="60" x="600" y="515" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hline" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="250" y="300" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="680" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vline" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="450" y="120" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="500" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frame" parent="1" style="rounded=0;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="430" x="250" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;" value="先做区
高回报 + 低投入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="180" x="260" y="128" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="monitor" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2563eb;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="监 控
1 周搭完，立刻见效
第一做" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="285" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="test" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="自动化测试
解除最大阻塞
第二做" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="305" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipeline" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="CI/CD 流水线
放大前两步，投入较大
第三做" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="495" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agile" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="敏捷协作
持续磨合，长期杠杆
第四做" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="130" x="495" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="seq" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="优先级顺序：监控 → 测试 → 流水线 → 敏捷" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="400" x="240" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
